author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أحمد بن علي بن معقل، أبو العباس، عز الدين الأزدي المُهَلَّبي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Known for his contributions to Arabic literature and criticism, particularly in analyzing the works of Al-Mutanabbi.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A critical work analyzing the commentaries on Al-Mutanabbi's poetry, highlighting errors and omissions in the explanations of his contemporaries.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Important for understanding the reception and interpretation of Al-Mutanabbi's poetry in the Islamic intellectual tradition.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Dr. Abdul Aziz bin Nasser Al-Mani is a respected scholar in Arabic literature and has contributed to the critical editions of several classical texts.
